name: osu-idle
description: osu! idle - a replica of the osu! startup experience (React client + Hono backend)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,server,types,web,client -c gray,green,cyan,magenta,blue npm:dev:shared npm:dev:server npm:dev:types npm:dev:web npm:dev:client
scripts.build: npm run i18n:extract && npm run i18n:compile && npm -w @osu-idle/shared run build && npm -w @osu-idle/server run build:types && npm -w @osu-idle/client run build && npm -w @osu-idle/web run build
scripts.build:deploy: npm -w @osu-idle/server run build:types && npm -w @osu-idle/client run build && npm -w @osu-idle/web run build
scripts.build:nodeploy: npm run build:shared && npm run build:types
scripts.deploy:prod: sudo echo 'starting' && node scripts/version-bump.mjs --verify "npm run i18n:upload && npm run i18n:download && node scripts/staged-build.mjs" && sudo systemctl restart osu-idle
scripts.deploy:prod:migrate: sudo echo 'starting' && node scripts/version-bump.mjs --verify "npm run i18n:upload && npm run i18n:download && node scripts/staged-build.mjs" && sudo systemctl stop osu-idle && npm run migrate:prod && sudo systemctl start osu-idle
scripts.deploy:server:prod: sudo echo 'starting' && npm -w @osu-idle/shared run build && npm -w @osu-idle/server run build:types && sudo systemctl restart osu-idle
scripts.build:web: npm -w @osu-idle/shared run build && npm -w @osu-idle/web run build
scripts.dev:desktop: npm -w @osu-idle/desktop run build && npm -w @osu-idle/desktop run start
scripts.build:desktop:main: npm -w @osu-idle/shared run build && npm -w @osu-idle/desktop run build
scripts.dist:desktop: npm run build && npm -w @osu-idle/desktop run dist
scripts.i18n:extract: npm -w @osu-idle/shared run extract && npm -w @osu-idle/server run extract && npm -w @osu-idle/client run extract && npm -w @osu-idle/web run extract
scripts.i18n:upload: npm run i18n:extract && crowdin upload sources
